# Resources & References

A curated collection of tools, libraries, and references that I use regularly.

## 🧬 Bioinformatics

### Python Libraries
- **[BioPython](https://biopython.org/)** — Bioinformatics toolkit
- **[Biopandas](https://biopandas.xyz/)** — Pandas-like interface for molecular data
- **[PyMOL](https://pymol.org/)** — Molecular visualization

### Reference Databases
- **[NCBI](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/)** — National Center for Biotechnology Information
- **[UniProt](https://www.uniprot.org/)** — Protein sequences and annotations
- **[PubMed](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/)** — Scientific literature

### Tools
- **[BLAST](https://blast.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/)** — Sequence alignment
- **[MUSCLE](https://www.drive5.com/muscle/)** — Multiple sequence alignment

---

## 🤖 Machine Learning

### Frameworks
- **[PyTorch](https://pytorch.org/)** — Deep learning (Python)
- **[TensorFlow](https://www.tensorflow.org/)** — ML platform
- **[JAX](https://github.com/google/jax)** — NumPy-like array computing

### Libraries
- **[Scikit-learn](https://scikit-learn.org/)** — Classical ML algorithms
- **[XGBoost](https://xgboost.readthedocs.io/)** — Gradient boosting
- **[Hugging Face](https://huggingface.co/)** — Transformers & models

### Learning Resources
- **[Fast.ai](https://www.fast.ai/)** — Practical deep learning
- **[Papers with Code](https://paperswithcode.com/)** — Latest research + code
- **[Distill](https://distill.pub/)** — Clear ML explanations

---

## 📊 Data Science

### Data Manipulation
- **[Pandas](https://pandas.pydata.org/)** — Data analysis
- **[Polars](https://www.pola-rs.com/)** — Fast DataFrames
- **[NumPy](https://numpy.org/)** — Numerical computing

### Visualization
- **[Matplotlib](https://matplotlib.org/)** — Plotting library
- **[Seaborn](https://seaborn.pydata.org/)** — Statistical visualization
- **[Plotly](https://plotly.com/)** — Interactive plots

### Data Versioning
- **[DVC](https://dvc.org/)** — Data version control
- **[Great Expectations](https://greatexpectations.io/)** — Data validation

---

## 💻 Development Tools

### Editors & IDEs
- **[Neovim](https://neovim.io/)** — Hyperextensible Vim fork
- **[VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/)** — General-purpose editor
- **[JupyterLab](https://jupyterlab.readthedocs.io/)** — Interactive notebooks

### Version Control
- **[Git](https://git-scm.com/)** — Distributed version control
- **[GitHub](https://github.com/)** — Code hosting & collaboration

### Package Management
- **[pip](https://pip.pypa.io/)** — Python package installer
- **[conda](https://docs.conda.io/)** — Environment & package manager
- **[Poetry](https://python-poetry.org/)** — Dependency management

### Command Line
- **[Neovim](https://neovim.io/)** — Terminal editor
- **[tmux](https://github.com/tmux/tmux)** — Terminal multiplexer
- **[ripgrep](https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep)** — Fast search

---

## 📚 Learning & Documentation

### Documentation
- **[Read the Docs](https://readthedocs.org/)** — Free documentation hosting
- **[GitHub Wiki](https://guides.github.com/features/wikis/)** — Project documentation

### Communities
- **[Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/)** — Q&A platform
- **[Reddit Communities](https://www.reddit.com/)** — r/MachineLearning, r/learnprogramming
- **[Discord Servers](https://discord.com/)** — ML & dev communities

### Courses & Tutorials
- **[Coursera](https://www.coursera.org/)** — University courses online
- **[edX](https://www.edx.org/)** — Online learning platform
- **[Kaggle Learn](https://www.kaggle.com/learn)** — Free micro-courses

---

## 🔗 Useful Links

- [Awesome Python](https://awesome-python.com/) — Curated Python resources
- [Awesome Machine Learning](https://github.com/josephmisiti/awesome-machine-learning) — ML resources
- [DevDocs](https://devdocs.io/) — Offline documentation browser
